display.purpose: Page titles and oversized metrics with operational authority.

headline.purpose: Section-leading copy and high-importance support text.

title.purpose: Core UI size for actions, fields, and dense operational layouts.

body.purpose: Default interface reading text and field content.

label.purpose: System labels, status text, nav text, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Primary card separation and subtle elevated surfaces.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Overlay and modal detachment from the main workspace.

motion.name: ease-emphatic-out
motion.purpose: Default ease for lifts, panel motion, and confident state changes.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Used for small color, border, and opacity adjustments.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The core action control, dark and assertive with a small lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 52px; padding: 6px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-default); background: var(--color-dark); color: var(--color-surface); font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A light-surface companion action with the same geometry and quieter emphasis.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 52px; padding: 6px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); border-radius: var(--radius-default); background: transparent; color: var(--color-dark); font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background: var(--color-surface-alt); border-color: var(--color-dark); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: The default text field, bright and structured with a slight lift on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted); } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); border-radius: var(--radius-default); background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-dark); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: -0.01em; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: var(--color-border); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-dark); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.06); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Top Navigation Link
components.description: Compact uppercase navigation pills for desktop app sections.
components.html: RidesDriversCoupons
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-default); background: transparent; color: var(--color-muted); text-decoration: none; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: color 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); color: var(--color-dark); border-color: var(--color-border-light); background: var(--color-surface); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-dark); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.06); } .ds-nav-link-active { color: var(--color-dark); border-color: var(--color-border-light); background: var(--color-surface); }

components.name: Status Pill
components.description: Mono uppercase status badges with semantic tint and a subtle interactive sheen.
components.css: .ds-status-pill { position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 28px; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-blue-mid); border-radius: var(--radius-default); background: var(--color-blue-light); color: var(--color-dark); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: transform 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-status-pill::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgb(255 255 255 / 0.28) 50%, transparent 100%); transform: translateX(-120%); opacity: 0; } .ds-status-pill:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-status-pill:hover::after { opacity: 1; animation: ds-status-sheen 0.75s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-status-pill:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-dark); outline-offset: 2px; } @keyframes ds-status-sheen { from { transform: translateX(-120%); } to { transform: translateX(120%); } }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: A default elevated surface with thin border, crisp corners, and disciplined shadow.
components.html:
Admin

Ride timeline

Operational lists, forms, and detail panels all inherit from this surface treatment.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: var(--radius-default); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); padding: 20px; transition: transform 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.2, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 0.35s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-card-label { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-muted); } .ds-card-title { margin: 12px 0 8px; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 24px; line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: var(--color-dark); } .ds-card-copy { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--color-mid); max-width: 48ch; }

components.name: Brand Monogram
components.description: The signature TC chip that anchors the brand and the system's operational glyph language.
components.css: .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-brand-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: var(--radius-default); background: var(--color-dark); color: var(--color-green); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.02em; box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgb(19 19 19 / 0.12); } .ds-brand-word { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: var(--color-dark); }

narrative.overview: Taxi Concierge is a restrained operational system with a premium service posture. Its visual language is built around crisp monochrome structure, a single electric-lime accent, and terse mono labels that make the product feel controlled rather than decorative. The goal is not luxury theater, it is composed operational trust. The system uses familiar product UI patterns, but sharpens them through contrast and cadence. Dark chips, mono labels, and compact borders create a dispatch-desk precision, while the lime accent marks completion, activation, and brand identity with intent.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained light theme with dark anchors and sparse accent use
Mono labels for structure and status
Small lift interactions instead of decorative motion
Bright operational surfaces with precise borders
Premium service tone without dashboard theatrics

rules.name: The Sparse Lime Rule
rules.body: Use lime for brand marks, completion, and high-confidence state, not as a broad decorative accent.

rules.name: The Mono Means System Rule
rules.body: When text describes structure, state, or navigation rather than narrative content, switch to Roboto Mono and uppercase tracking.

rules.name: The Lift On Intent Rule
rules.body: Shadows should appear when a surface needs stronger separation or a control enters an interactive state. Resting surfaces stay disciplined.

dos: Do keep the primary accent rare and high-signal.
Do use 4px corners as the default control geometry.
Do use Roboto Mono for labels, nav, and status language.
Do rely on borders, tone shifts, and small lift transitions before stronger decoration.
Do keep operational surfaces bright and calm.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboard templates with repetitive card grids and analytics-first hierarchy.
Don't introduce flashy dispatch-board aesthetics with loud colors, alarmist cues, or visual overstimulation.
Don't use casual consumer-booking patterns on operational surfaces where clarity and control matter more than friendliness.
Don't add side-stripe borders, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't spread lime across large surfaces or inactive states.
